mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO forecast (ts_code, ann_date, end_date, type, p_change_min, p_change_max, net_profit_min, net_profit_max, last_parent_net, summary, change_reason) VALUES
(#{i.tsCode}, #{i.annDate}, #{i.endDate}, #{i.type}, #{i.pChangeMin}, #{i.pChangeMax}, #{i.netProfitMin}, #{i.netProfitMax}, #{i.lastParentNet}, #{i.summary}, #{i.changeReason})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forecast WHERE ts_code = #{tsCode} AND ann_date IS NOT NULL AND ann_date != '' AND ann_date <= #{tradeDate} ORDER BY end_date DESC, ann_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ts_code, MAX(ann_date) AS latest_ann_date FROM forecast GROUP BY ts_code
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forecast WHERE ann_date LIKE CONCAT(#{annMonth}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forecast WHERE (p_change_min IS NOT NULL AND p_change_max IS NOT NULL AND p_change_min > p_change_max) OR (net_profit_min IS NOT NULL AND net_profit_max IS NOT NULL AND net_profit_min > net_profit_max)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forecast WHERE (type IN ('预增', '扭亏', '续盈', '略增') AND p_change_max IS NOT NULL AND p_change_max < 0) OR (type IN ('预减', '首亏', '续亏', '略减') AND p_change_min IS NOT NULL AND p_change_min > 0)
